## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm architecture:check` passes (required for any API change)
- [ ] `pnpm migration:discipline` passes (required for any database change)
- [ ] Tenant isolation (RLS) + RBAC + Zod validation verified for any new/changed endpoint
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this touches a published package
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (`docs/`, `README.md`, or Wiki)
